description.value: Price +1 bonus; Aura faint necromancy; CL 5th; Weight â DESCRIPTION When the wielder strikes a creature that is frightened, shaken, or panicked with a cruel weapon, that creature becomes sickened for 1 round. When the wielder uses the weapon to knock unconscious or kill a creature, he gains 5 temporary hit points that last for 10 minutes. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells cause fear, death knell; Cost +1 bonus
